headline: Sources: Texans acquire RB David Montgomery in trade with Lions
description: The Lions are trading running back David Montgomery to the Texans for offensive lineman Juice Scruggs and two draft picks, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

headline: Orlovsky: Jeremiyah Love is the best player in the draft
description: Dan Orlovsky confidently declares Jeremiyah Love as the best player in the 2026 NFL draft.

headline: Texans trade starting RT Tytus Howard to Browns, source says
description: The Texans have agreed to trade starting right tackle Tytus Howard to the Browns for a fifth-round draft pick, a source told ESPN.

headline: 2026 NFL combine: Mel Kiper's draft standouts, top workouts
description: Mel Kiper Jr. picked out 13 players who caught his attention during combine workouts, including Chris Brazzell II and Dani Dennis-Sutton.

headline: 2026 NFL combine: Gennings Dunker, Alan Herron lead best photos
description: The NFL combine puts top prospects in front of countless cameras, and because they're sprinting full speed or lifting heavy weights, the result is often some hilariously intense facial expressions.

headline: 2026 NFL combine: Top draft prospects, best workouts, risers
description: Spencer Fano impressed in the 40-yard dash, but there are plenty of strong offensive line prospects. Our experts break down the combine's top workouts.

headline: Taylen Green recounts record-breaking combine performance
description: Arkansas' Taylen Green, a top-10 quarterback prospect, recounts his record-breaking NFL combine performance.

headline: 2026 NFL combine buzz: Intel on free agency, trades, QBs
description: What will the Vikings, Cardinals, Colts and Dolphins do at QB? Has the A.J. Brown and Maxx Crosby trade buzz quieted? Which free agents are getting interest?

headline: Patriots prioritize draft, developing their own players
description: New England isn't likely to make any big free agent moves other than trying to hang onto its own.

headline: Mississippi State's Thompson clocks 4.26 in 40 at NFL combine
description: Mississippi State's Brenen Thompson clocked a 4.26-second 40-yard dash Saturday, the third fastest by a wide receiver at the combine since 2003.

headline: The best of Pat McAfee's week from the combine
description: Check out some of Pat McAfee's top guests from his week at the NFL combine.

headline: Taylen Green, top-10 QB prospect, sets several combine records
description: Taylen Green, a top-10 quarterback prospect ahead of April's NFL draft, set several positional combine records during Saturday's workout in Indianapolis.

headline: Top OL prospect Mauigoa: Battling Bain, Mesidor 'built who I am'
description: Francis Mauigoa, the top OL prospect in the NFL draft, said he's open to a position change. and said daily battles with Miami teammates Reuben Bain Jr. and Akheem Mesidor made him better.

headline: NFL draft: Ranking Fernando Mendoza vs. recent first-round QBs
description: Let's rank every quarterback picked in Round 1 from 2021 to 2025 based on predraft evaluations -- and then slot in the expected No. 1 pick for 2026.

headline: Why Ty Simpson feels he is a franchise quarterback
description: Ty Simpson speaks to the media at the NFL combine about proving himself as a franchise quarterback.

headline: Mendoza speaks at the NFL combine: ‘I mean who hasn't admired Tom Brady?’
description: Projected No. 1 pick Fernando Mendoza speaks to the media at the NFL combine about the opportunity to work with Tom Brady if he goes to the Raiders.

headline: Projected top RB pick Jeremiyah Love plans active NFL combine
description: Notre Dame running back Jeremiyah Love, No. 2 on ESPN's Mel Kiper Jr.'s Big Board, said he will not be one of the combine players who sits out the 40-yard dash or any combine drills Saturday.

headline: Beck makes his case to NFL teams to be a first-round pick
description: Carson Beck joins "The Rich Eisen Show" to explain what he offers to prospective NFL teams.

headline: Tennessee's Joey Aguilar at combine after waiver denied
description: Tennessee QB Joey Aguilar has pivoted to attending the NFL draft combine after having his waiver for another year of school denied.

headline: Ravens safety Kyle Hamilton flabbergasted by Sonny Styles comparison
description: The Baltimore Ravens star received an unexpected comparison at the 2026 NFL combine.
